metadata.book_title: Brihat Parasara Hora Sastra Vol 2 By Maharishi Parashara
metadata.chapter_title: Results during the Mahadasa of Saturn

content_blocks.text: Results during the Mahadasa of Saturn :

अथ सर्व्वेपु खेटेषु योगतिहीनः प्रकीर्तितः ।
तस्य भास्करपुत्रस्य कथयामि दशाफलम् ॥१४२॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
अथ सर्व्वेपु खेटेषु योगतिहीनः प्रकीर्तितः ।
तस्य भास्करपुत्रस्य कथयामि दशाफलम् ॥१४२॥

content_blocks.text: Now I unfold the result of the Saturn (Suryaputra) who is a most inferior and degraded amongst all the planets.

verse_data.translation: Now I unfold the result of the Saturn (Suryaputra) who is a most inferior and degraded amongst all the planets.

content_blocks.text:
स्वोचे स्वक्षेत्रे मन्दे मित्रक्षेत्रेऽपि वा यदि ।
मूलत्रिकोणे भागे वा तुंगांशे स्वांशगेऽपि वा ॥१४३॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
स्वोचे स्वक्षेत्रे मन्दे मित्रक्षेत्रेऽपि वा यदि ।
मूलत्रिकोणे भागे वा तुंगांशे स्वांशगेऽपि वा ॥१४३॥
verse_data.topic: Saturn in exaltation, own sign, friendly sign, Mooltrikona, exalted Navamsa, own Navamsa

content_blocks.text:
दुश्चिक्ये लाभगे चैव राजसम्मानवैभवम् ।
राजयोगं प्रकुर्वीत सेनाधीशमहत्सुखम् ॥१४४॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
दुश्चिक्ये लाभगे चैव राजसम्मानवैभवम् ।
राजयोगं प्रकुर्वीत सेनाधीशमहत्सुखम् ॥१४४॥
verse_data.topic: Results of Saturn in 12th, 11th, and its effect on royalty and military command

content_blocks.text:
लक्ष्मीक्टाक्षचिन्तानि राज्यलाभं करोति च ।
गृहे कल्याणसम्पत्तिर्पुत्रादिलाभकृत् ॥१४६॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
लक्ष्मीक्टाक्षचिन्तानि राज्यलाभं करोति च ।
गृहे कल्याणसम्पत्तिर्पुत्रादिलाभकृत् ॥१४६॥
verse_data.topic: Saturn's effect on wealth, kingdom, and progeny

content_blocks.text: If Saturn is in the sign of exaltation, own sign, friendly sign, Mooltrikona, the 9th house, or in the Navamsa of the exaltation or own signs, the 3rd house, the 11th house, the native is bestowed with recognition from the king (Government), accretion of wealth, pleasure of literary discussions, elephant ride at the behest of the king, Jewellery etc., high status, commander of the army, monetary gains, splendid happiness. The native gains through authorities (Government), prosperity at home, marriage (wife), birth of son etc.

verse_data.translation: If Saturn is in the sign of exaltation, own sign, friendly sign, Mooltrikona, the 9th house, or in the Navamsa of the exaltation or own signs, the 3rd house, the 11th house, the native is bestowed with recognition from the king (Government), accretion of wealth, pleasure of literary discussions, elephant ride at the behest of the king, Jewellery etc., high status, commander of the army, monetary gains, splendid happiness. The native gains through authorities (Government), prosperity at home, marriage (wife), birth of son etc.

content_blocks.text: Notes: In the natural horoscope, Saturn is the lord of 10th and 11th houses. 10th house represents authority (Government) and 11th house denotes profit, gains etc. Therefore, in the benefic placement of Saturn, the native, during the Dasa of Saturn, acquires wealth, status, business, education, success in ventures, governmental post etc. The 10th house also is related to festivals and hence it gives festivities and celebrations of such nature in which lots of presents etc. are received. The native helps others in their business activities through his contacts with the high authorities. He also makes some profit in this process. Some learned Astrologers take the 11th house for the birth of the child because the 11th house is the 5th from the 7th house (wife house). The Sage has said about

Dasas Results
Results during the Mahadasa of Saturn :
अथ सर्व्वेपु खेटेषु योगतिहीनः प्रकीर्तितः ।
तस्य भास्करपुत्रस्य कथयामि दशाफलम् ॥१४२॥
52: Now I unfold the result of the Saturn (Suryaputra) who
is a most inferior and degraded amongst all the planets.
स्वोचे स्वक्षेत्रे मन्दे मित्रक्षेत्रेऽपि वा यदि ।
मूलत्रिकोणे भागे वा तुंगांशे स्वांशगेऽपि वा ॥१४३॥
दुश्चिक्ये लाभगे चैव राजसम्मानवैभवम् ।
राजयोगं प्रकुर्वीत सेनाधीशमहत्सुखम् ॥१४४॥
लक्ष्मीक्टाक्षचिन्तानि राज्यलाभं करोति च ।
गृहे कल्याणसम्पत्तिर्पुत्रादिलाभकृत् ॥१४६॥
53-56: If Saturn is in the sign of exaltation, own sign, friendly
sign, Mooltrikona, the 9th house, or in the Navamsa of the exaltation
or own signs, the 3rd house, the 11th house, the native is bestowed
with recognition from the king (Government), accretion of wealth,
pleasure of literary discussions, elephant ride at the behest of the
king, Jewellery etc., high status, commander of the army, monetary
gains, splendid happiness. The native gains through authorities
(Government), prosperity at home, marriage (wife), birth of son etc.
Notes: In the natural horoscope, Saturn is the lord of 10th and
11th houses. 10th house represents authority (Government) and 11th
house denotes profit, gains etc. Therefore, in the benefic placement of
Saturn, the native, during the Dasa of Saturn, acquires wealth, status,
business, education, success in ventures, governmental post etc. The
10th house also is related to festivals and hence it gives festivities and
celebrations of such nature in which lots of presents etc. are received. The
native helps others in their business activities through his contacts with the
high authorities. He also makes some profit in this process. Some learned
Astrologers take the 11th house for the birth of the child because the 11th
